validation_gates.reason: Repository identity, permissions, default branch, current base, target blob, schema home, child and compatibility lanes, ADRs, workflows, commands, validator runner, CODEOWNERS, Directory Rules, drift register, and generated-receipt contract were inspected.
All 195 lines of the v0.3 target were read, including metadata, headings, badges, tables, commands, links, open questions, and final line.
Main remained 0ca82aaaf6aac8e7fe5e1a91892c2ffb2132d050, the target remained blob 43c989a3bead8289bdbaba1a645980f95b0baf3a before mutation, and no overlapping open PR or branch was surfaced.

The existing canonical schemas/ root README was updated in place. No root, schema family, contract, policy, fixture, validator, lifecycle phase, proof, release, or public path was created, moved, renamed, or canonized.
The README was reconciled against current canonical-v1 workflow checks, six aggregate validators, proposed ADR status, CODEOWNERS routing, and inspected compatibility lanes.

The first twelve H2 sections exactly match Purpose, Authority level, Status, What belongs here, What does NOT belong here, Inputs, Outputs, Validation, Review burden, Related folders, ADRs, and Last reviewed.
MarkdownIt parsed 3,565 tokens; one H1 and twenty-four H2 sections were found; fenced blocks are balanced.
Forty-three internal fragments resolve; sixteen custom anchors are unique; legacy fragments are retained; twenty-two repository-relative destinations were inspected.
Six static Shields badge URLs link to evidence-bearing sections. No dynamic CI, release, coverage, registry, or maturity badge was added.
Badge endpoint reachability was not required to verify the repository content and was not claimed.

Stable identity, root purpose, authority split, child lanes, authoring rules, alias strictness, fixture polarity, ID guidance, versioning, change planning, open questions, and legacy fragments were preserved.
No private key block, common GitHub/OpenAI/AWS token pattern, credential, private endpoint, protected payload, sensitive location, living-person record, or genomic record was introduced.
GitHub returned blob 15c84131862c00584664dfafa497c012ae765d33, matching the locally computed Git blob for the validated 49,382-byte README.

Required fields, allowed truth labels, validation outcomes, artifact/hash closure, model metadata, citations, timestamps, and pending human-review state were checked against the inspected generated-receipt contract.
Documentation/provenance-only change; no schema, contract, fixture, validator, test, policy, workflow, package, runtime, release, or public behavior changed.
Repository checks run after draft pull-request creation and were unavailable at receipt emission time.

notes: AI-authored documentation-only modernization on a scoped review branch. The schemas root README is upgraded in place, reconciled to the current six-validator and workflow surface, and reordered to the required root README contract. It preserves the machine-shape boundary, records proposed ADR status and compatibility debt, and makes no executable, schema, contract, fixture, validator, policy, lifecycle, release, deployment, or public-surface change. Human review remains pending; this receipt is process provenance, not approval, schema proof, release authority, or publication authority.
